creator: martin@matuska.org
text:
After a discussion with miwi@freebsd.org, we don't want to confuse old
jabber-port users.

This is why the name "jabber" might stay.
Attached patch updates net-im/jabber port to 1.6.0 (and enables use of
MySQL + PostgreSQL)

Links:
Patch:
http://www.matuska.org/martin/freebsd/ports/patches/net-im_jabber.patch
.tar.gz:
http://www.matuska.org/martin/freebsd/ports/patches/net-im_jabber.tar.gz
Tinderbox log:
http://tinderbox.vx.sk/logs/6.2-FreeBSD-amd64/jabber-1.6.0,1.log

portlint -a:

conditionally disable gettext support.
WARN: Makefile: possible use of absolute pathname "/var/run/jabberd".
WARN: Makefile: possible use of absolute pathname "/var/spool/jabberd".
WARN: Makefile: possible use of absolute pathname "/var/log/jabberd".
WARN: Makefile: only one MASTER_SITE configured.  Consider adding
additional mirrors.
0 fatal errors and 5 warnings found.
